# Contributing

Thanks for considering a contribution.

## How to contribute
- Search existing issues first.
- For non-trivial changes, open an issue to discuss direction.
- Keep PRs focused and small when possible.

## Pull requests
- Describe the “why” and the tradeoffs, not just the “what”.
- Include tests where appropriate.
- Avoid introducing new dependencies without discussion.
- Don’t include secrets (API keys, tokens, private URLs).

## Security issues
Do not open public issues for vulnerabilities. See SECURITY.md.

## License
By contributing, you agree your contributions are licensed under the repository’s license.
